gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7600 XT (radeonsi, navi33, LLVM 18.1.6, DRM 3.57, 6.10.6-200.fc40.x86_64)
notes: Had to change default controller bindings, but even after that i couldn't play comfortable. Controllers were badly rotated, performance was terrible (over 16ms to render frame on lowest settings, while on windows i could play on max settings at 120hz). Used Quest 2 via ALVR (most likely all problems were due to my hmd)
